column1: Hey Jessica, thanks for your interest in traveling with Go Blue Tours. Your personal trip rep, Spiffy, will text shortly with info and details
What's good! It's Spiffy from Go Blue here
Which week is your spring break? I'll send over the options and deets
Which destination were we looking at?
How many ppl in your group so far? Will hook it up for y'all
heyy jess gonna send over that cancun info, whats a good email for you?
i think it's gonna be around 6 people maybe 5! a good email is jessie.baker3@yahoo.com
dope thats a solid group, can always add ppl on if needed, we all from the same school?
cool which school? I'll hook it up with a good group rate
oh dope we have a lot of UMass groups this year, gonna be a fun time
y'all def know how to party lol
putting this info together for you right now, how soon were you looking to get things started?
Loved “y'all def know how to party lol”
i'll have to talk to my group about pricing and stuff but soon!

cool, i'll send what i have now but just keep in mind pricing does change pretty quick this time of year. I'll also add in the payment plan, it lets you get your spot reserved now and worry about paying the rest later!
cool if i send through email? its a little long for text
bet! Will send in a few
just sent that over lmk if it came through!

Liked “cool, i'll send what i have now but just keep in mind pricing does change pretty quick this time of year. I'll also add in the payment plan, it lets you get your spot reserved now and worry about paying the rest later!”
just got it! thank you i'll send it to my group
sounds good. would love to hook it up for y'all with that black friday deal. lmk what they think!
is there any way to add in flights too?
we def can, where will we be flying out of? which airport
cool lets see what I can do! sometimes its a little cheaper to get flights separately on your own
its an optional add on, comes with express entry to 3 club events, cover charge, plus all you can drink at the clubs! Also includes a booze cruise which is also all you can drink
currently we have a bundle deal where you can get the entire pass for just $200 a person
there is still a bunch of events/parties on resort itself tho, and those are all included in the base package!
awesome! i'll talk with my group.
is there anyway to get a room in the pyramid at the grand oasis? if not totally fine
hey yea i can check and see availability, its probably gonna be more expense tho, and tbh the rooms are fairly similar
side note - the pyramid does require everyone to be 21+, does that work for y'all?
during spring break they like to keep the pyramid for the older crowd since its "nicer". I'm just waiting on ops to see availability/pricing and i can send it over to you
tbh tho the difference in price between the two isn't worth it, you barely spend time in your room anyways lol
okay sounds good just lmk what they say!
we are not worried about the rooms so much just if we get better food w the pyramid!
gotcha yea honestly with the pyramid you only get access to a few more restaurants, and they are only available by making a reservation
right now pricing is 3 per room- $765 and 2 per room- $799
this pricing is only valid for today though, may change by tomorrow
okay thanks for letting me know. could u tell me the total prices including flights for both the pyramid hotel and just the grand oasis hotel for 3 per room for 4 nights?
for 4 nights is $1299 for the grand o including flights! Bos > Cancun. we have a handful of ppl from your school doing this package
pyramid at this very moment we're looking at $1409 with flights included
heyy Jess whats up, how we feelin so far?
hi! me and my group are still discussing it but i will lyk asap!
sounds gooood lmk if you guys got any questions, def wanna lock y'all in before pricing goes up
thank u for everything so far!!
fs i got you! lmk if you guys got any questions!
Jesss whats up hope break was good, how we lookin for break?
thank you u as well! we are all on board to book it on friday i believe!
Okay cool. Yea just shoot me a text in the am and I'll set up the reservation!
Loved “Okay cool. Yea just shoot me a text in the am and I'll set up the reservation!”
how are the rooms set up if we have 6 people?
We'll just do two rooms of 3 ppl!
just checked, I'm able to honor the same price still
heyy Jess whats up, how we lookin with things?
hey checkin in, did we want to make a move on that package?
hi! sorry been so busy but we haven't had time to sit down and book but let me talk to my group and see where we're at
cool no worries i know how it gets lol, bot cool keep me in the loop!
Jesss whats up, whats the group consensus with everything so far?
i am hoping to get everyone to try and book it tmrw!!
okay cool, want me to set the reservation up so you can send it out to everyone tomorrow?
hi!! we are leaning more towards the pyramid hotel if that's still an option?
heyy yea! lemme double check the current pricing / availability for it rn!
ok dope, sorry just waiting on ops for an update. If we have the availability were you guys looking to get things moving today?
hey pardon the delay, so turns out we'd need the group to be over 25 to book the pyramid rooms during spring break season
so the best situation, is we book the Grand Oasis, and then while there you can get the premium wristband for a few days. thatll give you access to some of the premium restaurants
would you want to do it that way?
cool yea lmk what everyone thinks, and i can get you a reservation started
hi!! u can get the reservation started!
lets do it! 4 nights right, March 14-18? two rooms of 3
it is definitely 5 people rn the 6th person is gonna decide later on but if she decides she's in is it possible to just add her in to one of our rooms?
just the base package now without flights right? just want to make sure
oh okay! the price will be a little diff now than it was before. flights have def gone up
just sent you a reservation email without flights if you wanna check that out
getting with flights option info in a few
Loved “getting with flights option info in a few”
so with flights right now looking at $1560 per person for the 2 person room and $1456 per person for the 3 person room
lmk if we wanna roll with it!
okay we might go with the package without the flights and book them on our own!
so just to clarify, the package you sent without the flights is that we each pay $606 for 3 people per room
2 person room is a little bit more, if / when the 6th person joins itll go down to the 606
and yea getting flights on your own is the best way
okay so what happens is the 6th person does not join later on?
she probably won't decide until january if she's coming
if she doesnt join nothing changes, everything will stay the same as the reservation I sent over in the email
if she does, and we have the availability to add her in, the price will just go down for the people in the 2 person room
okay i'm confused about the room situation.. how will it work for 5 people if she does not join at all
no worries. do you have the recent email I just sent you with the reservation without flights
so open that up, and hit the 'Join This Trip' button. should be yellow I wanna say
well first click access reservation itll open up the web page, then join button
ok i see the screen that has the room situation
so if she is added let's say in february, how will this work if we already paid

cool so. when shes ready, step 1 I gotta see if we can get her added in. step 2 we'll have to see what the current 3 person room rate is at the time shes looking to be added in. step 3, we'll add her in, and any overage you've already paid will be reimbursed to you
ok i see what ur saying is there anyway to split up everyone's cost so 2 people aren't paying $100 extra?
like disburse the cost for everyone
yea we can balance it all out
so everyone is paying let's say $20 extra
oh awesome! how would that work
are u allowed to change the cost in the reservation for each person
and what would this look like for everyone cost wise
yup! just hit refresh on that link
ok awesome let me talk to group and i will get back to u asap
and we get access to parties and events on the resort as well??
just making sure everything is included
and if we want to add booze cruise when we're there can we?
yea the on resort events are included!
and booze cruise yup you can add on site. not sure what the price will be
sounds good and do we need to pay $30 in cash on site?
yea yup thats at the resort! its a resort specific thing that we dont handle
Okay dope lmk if you need anything!
thank u for all ur help!!

Hi!! I just had a quick question regarding the party package for the off resort nightclubs! I saw it's around $210 for one of the packages and was just wondering how much the cover and drinks would be if we did not get the package or if u have any recommendations as to what we should do?
yo! honestly Im not sure what the cover charge is at doors but I know since so many ppl usually have a pre-bought party pass door admission is usually slim
if you 100% wanna go out at night, the party pass is the way to go
do u know what specific clubs are included in the package?
yea - D'Cave, Coco Bongo, Hall of Fame, Vaquita, Mandala, Mandala Beach, Rakata
perfect!! i also wanted to ask about any options there are in case travel isn't safe to mexico during the week we are supposed to be going with everything going on
and if we decide to not go what would that look like?

yea so at the moment hotels and airlines are still operating as normal. The media going around is tied to other parts of Mexico, not the Cancun hotel zone where our resorts are. Cancun tourism areas are heavily secured
if you are uncomfortable and wanted to change your trip, I can def help you get a clean switch to Punta Cana where I'll be
okay thank you sm i'll keep you updated if we end up wanting to switch!!
if we ended up not wanting to go at all would there be a way to get a refund?
yea if you have the insurance with Travel Insured you can submit a claim for refund!
ok!! and if we were to switch to punta cana how would that work and what would be included in that?
it would all be the same price, a clean swap, same things included. hotel is Occidental Punta Cana, and the airport is PUJ
yo Jess! is Katherine and Daniela on the same flight as anyone else in the group
also did y'all want to add any of the party pass tickets to your package?
yes they are on the same flight! and i will lyk about the party passes asap!
safe travels today! gonna be lit
Loved “safe travels today! gonna be lit”
npppp I got you! if you need anything lmk
how do we get to our driver for the hotel?
Look for staff in royal blue shirts that say go blue tours
